scope: Migration of internal/connectors/linear: the 4 legacy-parity read root connections only (issues, teams, projects, users), each a distinct GraphQL root QUERY field (a read, never a mutation) on the SAME single POST /graphql endpoint. Every covered/excluded entry below is declared method GET (not the literal wire HTTP verb, which is always POST for GraphQL) to correctly signal READ semantics to connectorgen validate's capabilities.write/read cross-check (design §E.1 rule 4), matching monday's identical documented convention. Linear's full documented API surface (mutations, webhooks, comments, cycles, labels, other connections) is out of scope until Pass B.

excluded.reason: bounded identity/connectivity check used by Check(), not a syncable object stream
Pass B capability expansion; linear is read-only in this migration (legacy Write returns ErrUnsupportedOperation)
